Indian Wheel"
1. Place your bet.
Choose the amount you want to wager before each round.
2. Launch the wheel.
Press SPIN – the mechanic pulls the lever and the wheel shoots off the spinning flywheel into the sky.
3. Fly through the route.
The wheel follows a unique flight path filled with elements that change your potential win.
4. Collect elements along the way:
+1 / +2 / +5 / +10 – add to your total win.
×2 / ×3 / ×4 / ×5 – multiply your current win.
/2 (pigeons) – divide your current win by two.
Ladder Holder – can appear and save the wheel from falling into the pit, launching it higher again.
Wall – ends the round with a loss if the wheel crashes into it.
Petarda Crow – triggers a sudden drop but doesn't change your total win.
5. Win or Lose:
Win: the wheel lands and stops on the sand – your current total is credited as a win.
Lose: the wheel falls into the pit or crashes into the Wall – you lose the round.
6. Auto Game.
Hold the SPIN button to activate Auto Game:
Choose how many rounds to play automatically.
Wins are shown automatically, and the next round starts after each result.
7. Win rounding.

If your winnings exceed your bet (play amount), the game will round your profit up to the nearest whole number. If your winnings are less than your bet, the game will round them down to the nearest whole number.
8. Malfunction voids all pays and plays."

How to play?: "How to play?

Game: Place your bet. Choose the amount you want to wager before each round.

Choose your difficulty. Select Easy, Medium, or Hard before the round begins. Difficulty affects your chance of scoring and how fast the multiplier grows. You can only change difficulty between rounds. Easy - 73% chance to score, smooth multiplier growth (up to x100). Medium - 53% chance to score, fast multiplier growth (up to x11,948). Hard - 33% chance to score, exponential multiplier growth (up to x13,774,951).
Kick the ball. Tap the ball to take a penalty kick. The target zones on the goal are visual only and do not affect the outcome - the result is determined by the server before you kick.

Score goals to grow your multiplier. Each successful goal increases your multiplier along the progress scale. A miss ends the round immediately and your winnings are lost. Goal - multiplier increases, round continues. Miss - round ends, payout = 0.
Cash out at any time. Press CASHOUT after any successful goal to collect your winnings and end the round early. Your payout is calculated as: Bet x Current Multiplier.
Win or Lose. Win: you pressed CASHOUT or scored all kicks in the series. Lose: you missed - the round ends with no payout.

Buy Bonus. Purchase a bonus round instantly for a fixed cost based on your bet. Easy: x30 bet | Medium: x60 bet | Hard: x100 bet. After purchase, a 7-sector roulette spins and determines the number of kicks in the bonus round. CASHOUT is not available in the bonus game - the series plays until a miss or all kicks are completed. A successful bonus round shows a Bonus Win screen with your payout.
Malfunction voids all pays and plays"

How to play?: "How to play?

Game: Place your bet. Select the amount you want to bet before each round begins.
Select your target. Chickens fly randomly across the screen. You can manually tap any chicken on the screen or use the SPIN button to automatically shoot at a random target.

Shooting and rounds. In this game, 1 round equals 1 shot. Manual mode: each tap on a chicken activates one shot. Hold SPIN: activates continuous shooting mode, which works as long as the button is held down.
Target types. There are different types of chickens flying around the farm, each with its own multiplier (from x1.1 to x48), with the multiplier progressing up to x120.

Progressive win growth. If you select a target and fail to destroy it N times in a row, its potential multiplier begins to increase with each subsequent miss. Growth: a fixed increment is added to the current multiplier for each miss. Reset: the multiplier returns to its base value only after the target is destroyed.

Win or lose. Win: the shot was successful, the chicken explodes instantly, and your bet is multiplied by its coefficient. Lose: you hit the chicken, but it did not explode — in this case, the winnings for the round are canceled.

Auto Game. Hold down the SPIN button or open the settings menu to activate automatic mode. Selecting targets: you can manually select the types of chickens (multipliers) that the system will fire at. Round settings: select the number of auto spins (from 10 to 1000), and the game will continue until they are completed or stopped by the player.
Technical malfunctions void all payouts and games.
Malfunction voids all pays and plays"

Mineslot 2
How to play?: "Select your bet size.

Game: Press the Spin button. Five reels with three symbols each will start spinning. They may contain symbols such as:
• Wooden pickaxe
• Stone pickaxe
• Gold pickaxe
• Enchanted pickaxe

Each of them has its own strength. After each of the reels stops, the pickaxes will start to fall down. At the bottom is a 5x7 block field. Each of them has its own strength, and each one destroyed gives its own reward. There are 6 types of blocks in the game:
• Earth
• Stone
• Ore
• Gold
• Diamonds
• Obsidian

At the bottom of each row is a locked chest. When a row is completely cleared of blocks, the chest opens. It drops a multiplier that will be applied to the total winnings. If several chests are opened, the multipliers are multiplied together. The following multipliers can drop from the chests: 2x, 3x, 4x, 5x, 10x, 25x, 50x, 100x.

When three scatters appear or when a bonus is purchased, the bonus game begins. The bonus game consists of 3-5 free spins that work according to the rules of the main game, but with each new spin of the reel in the bonus game, the field between free spins is not regenerated. That is, during the bonus game free spins, the same field is destroyed, maintaining the progress of destruction between spins."
